event.description: US officials convened emergency meeting with bank CEOs over concerns that Anthropic's AI model Mythos could enable advanced cyberattacks on financial institutions

harm.description: At Andon Market in San Francisco, the AI manager Luna, powered by Anthropic and Google models, autonomously runs store operations. parsed_output.description: A 2026 report reveals that rapid deployment of autonomous AI agents, reliant on APIs, has outpaced security measures, leading to a surge in API security incidents.

harm.description: Anthropic accidentally leaked the source code of its Claude Code AI system, exposing proprietary information but not client data. event.description: Anthropic accidentally leaked Claude Code source code exposing proprietary information; separately restricted access to Claude Mythos Preview due to its cybersecurity vulnerability detection capability
